# platformInfraInitEmptyRepo

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformInfraInitEmptyRepo

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformInfraInitEmptyRepoMutation(); mutate({ input: { sId: '<UUID>', storeId: '<UUID>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformInfraInitEmptyRepoMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformInfraInitEmptyRepoMutation();

```
